subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath reached Me and, praise be to God, it bore tidings of thy health and well-being, and concerning thy turning towards Persia [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مکتوب آنجناب رسید الحمد لله مشعر بر صحت و عافیت بود و اینکه درباره توجه بعجم
subcodes.subjects: @freedom of thought and action, @personal instructions, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
